description: Explore Münster on two wheels along its famous Promenade ring or riverside paths.

locationInfo.description: A 4.5 km tree-lined ring encircling the old city, beloved by cyclists and pedestrians alike.

description: Relax on the grass with good food and great company in one of Münster's green spaces.
groupSuitability: Perfect for couples, families, and small groups

locationInfo.description: A spacious park in western Münster with wide meadows, ideal for picnics and relaxation.
safetyTips: Avoid areas with bees and wasps near food

description: Toss a frisbee with friends on the open grass of Gievenbeck Park.
groupSuitability: Best for pairs or small groups

locationInfo.lighting: Open meadow — good light in daytime
locationInfo.description: A residential sports park with large open grass areas suitable for informal games.

description: Organise a casual kick-about on one of Münster's public sports fields.

locationInfo.description: Public football pitches with marked fields — first come, first served.
safetyTips: Check pitch availability during busy periods

description: Use GPS to hunt for hidden caches scattered around Münster's parks and landmarks.

locationInfo.lighting: Varies by cache location — most are accessible in daylight
locationInfo.description: Hundreds of geocaches hidden across Münster — from the city centre to forests and cycle paths.
safetyTips: Download the Geocaching app before you go
Return the cache exactly as found

description: Let your kite soar on the wide open meadows of Westpark — perfect when it's breezy.

locationInfo.lighting: Open parkland with good natural light
locationInfo.description: Wide, flat meadows with minimal obstacles — ideal conditions for getting a kite up quickly.
safetyTips: Avoid flying near power lines or trees
Keep children away from kite lines

description: A gentle stroll through quiet woodland and fields, soaking up the natural surroundings.

locationInfo.lighting: Open reserve — good natural light in daytime
locationInfo.description: A UNESCO-recognised wetland reserve north of Münster, home to rare birds and wildflowers.
safetyTips: Stick to marked paths to protect nesting wildlife

description: Kick a ball around with friends for a fun, low-key game on the public fields.
groupSuitability: Best for small and large groups

locationInfo.description: Large open grass areas in Westpark often used for informal football games — no booking required.
safetyTips: Be mindful of other park users
No slide tackles on hard ground
Carry a basic first aid kit
